violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The bar is lacking a hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with black and brown debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Ceviche is served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink in the bar area. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
